name: @studio/scheduled-runs
description: Recurring task runs as a reusable feature-package: the schedules table (owner-scoped RLS + REVOKE), app-side create/cancel actions, and the pure cadence/next-run math. The poller (a hosted n8n Schedule Trigger) stays studio infra and is described, never shipped — no client-side cron. Tier-gated by features.scheduledRuns.
